Supplementary Series Home | Orre Games Home | XD Home

Mt. Battle Trainers

After defeating Cooltrainer Bardo and speaking with Vander at Mt. Battle, the player can choose to take on the Mt. Battle Challenge, where they will have to defeat 100 Trainers to reach the top. If the player defeats all 100 Trainers in a row, and uses the same team for all 100 battles, their Pokémon will receive the Earth Ribbon, and they will be able to choose one of the three Johto Starters. Beating the challenge again with the same restrictions a second and third time allows the player to get the other two Johto Starters.

Defeating each Area rewards the player with Poké Coupons, which can be exchanged for items in the lobby of Mt. Battle. Each Area has a set amount of Poké Coupons, but each Legendary Pokémon the player users will drop the reward by 15%. The rewards for each area are given at the beginning of each area's data.

The player will also receive an item for the first time clearing an area.

All of the battles are Double Battles, even in the case where the opposing Trainer only has one Pokémon.

  • Area 1 (1-10)
  • Area 2 (11-20)
  • Area 3 (21-30)
  • Area 4 (31-40)
  • Area 5 (41-50)
  • Area 6 (51-60)
  • Area 7 (61-70)
  • Area 8 (71-80)
  • Area 9 (81-90)
  • Area 10 (91-100)

Area 1 (Battles 1-10)

The reward is 200 Poké Coupons and a Macho Brace.
